case_title: MAR, PAUL vs. LYONS, RICHARD et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LYONS, JACQUELINE
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT LYONS, JACQUELINE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAR, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT LYONS, RICHARD

JUDGE JOAN SMITH JOHN P. ZANGHI FOR THE PLFT. JACQUELINE LYON, PRESENT & IN PRO PER 3:45 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFT RICHARD LYON, WHERE AN ENTRY OF DEFAULT WAS ENTERED 9/14/93. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMT, TERMS AS FOLLOWS: DEFT TO VACATE PREM ON 10/6/93 5PM. PREM DEEMED VACATED WHEN DEFT DELIVERS KEY TO PLTF'S OFFICE & PERSONAL BELONGINGS REMOVED. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT AFTER 10/6/93 DEEMED ABANDONED. PLTF. WAIVED BACK RENTS/ATTYS FEES TOTAL $4,000. DEFT PRESERVES RIGHT TO BRING CIVIL ACTION FOR AFFIRMATIVE RELIEF HOWEVER, ANY JUDGMENT ENTERED IN HER FAVOR IN THAT AFFIR- MATIVE ACTION WILL BE OFFSET IN THE AMT OF $3,400. IF DEFT DEFAULTS, PLTF. ON EX-PARTE APPLICATION W/ 24 HOURS NOTICE HAVE JUDGMENT ENTERED FOR POSS PLUS RENTS/DAMAGES/FEES FOR $4,000. IF DEFT. COMPLIES, PLTF. WILL DISMISS ACTION AS TO HER W/IN 5 DAYS OF LEAVING THE PREMISES. AGREEMENT TO BE TO BE SIGNED IN PLTF'S OFFICE & FILED W/ THE COURT 9/20/93.
